# UI IP Toolkit

UI IP Toolkit is a static, zero-runtime-dependency frontend asset catalog for web developers. It provides quick visual access to copy-ready UI assets, including buttons, gradients, loaders, CTAs, footers, bento grids, product UI patterns, layout fragments, local fonts, animation recipes and reusable CSS utilities.

Official site: https://ui-ip-toolkit.vercel.app/
Repository: https://github.com/ikerperez12/UI-IP-Toolkit-v4.0
README: https://github.com/ikerperez12/UI-IP-Toolkit-v4.0#readme
License: MIT
Author: ikerperez12
Sitemap: https://ui-ip-toolkit.vercel.app/sitemap.xml
Image sitemap: https://ui-ip-toolkit.vercel.app/sitemap-images.xml
Search vocabulary: https://ui-ip-toolkit.vercel.app/search-keywords.txt

Important public assets:
- Hero image: https://ui-ip-toolkit.vercel.app/.github/assets/ui-ip-toolkit-hero.png
- Social card: https://ui-ip-toolkit.vercel.app/.github/assets/ui-ip-toolkit-social.png
- Bento overview: https://ui-ip-toolkit.vercel.app/.github/assets/ui-ip-toolkit-bento.png
- Demo GIF: https://ui-ip-toolkit.vercel.app/.github/assets/ui-ip-toolkit-demo.gif

Suggested summary:
UI IP Toolkit is a visual library for developers who want fast, comfortable access to reusable frontend assets. It is built as a public static catalog with copy-ready snippets and no backend or runtime framework dependency.
